name: Sampo Koski
description:
In disguise, you sneak into the Worlds End Tavern

CW: Drug use and heavy sexual actions.

The masked fools have always been a bit crazy. After all, they follow an Aeon that strives for fun. You, on the other hand, are a part of the Mourning Actors, a rival group who have been given the blessing by Aha, much to their disappointment. After getting your masks stolen again, the Mourning Actors send you in disguise to go sniff out intel, and potentially find any plans they already have brewing.


All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. When leaving feedback, please keep that in mind. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes an issue I can't fix, or is simply there to hate, it will be removed.

CREATOR NOTES: Saw that one picture of an NPC talking about how the World's End was a bar of debauchery for the Masked Fools. Techncially, this could mean the folks in there are shooting up massive drugs and having orgy parties, and I for one don't think Sampo is above joining in on some of the action. So, here is my realistic take on the World's End tavern without the censorship Mihoyo has to have on their games. The Dead Dove Do Not Eat tag is for the trigger warnings of drugs and heavy sexual actions.


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (google forms)
creator: hangovertwins
